glosses.vi: đài phun nước; vòi nước uống

sentences.target: On se retrouve à la fontaine, vers midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv a la fɔ̃tɛn vɛʁ midi/

translations.fr: On se retrouve à la fontaine, vers midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv a la fɔ̃tɛn vɛʁ midi/
translations.en: We meet at the fountain around noon.
translations.es: Nos vemos en la fuente hacia el mediodía.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns gegen Mittag am Brunnen.
translations.it: Ci vediamo alla fontana verso mezzogiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们中午左右在喷泉见面。
translations.yue: 我哋中午左右喺噴泉度見面。
translations.ru: Встретимся у фонтана примерно в полдень.
translations.pt: Nos encontramos na fonte por volta do meio-dia.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở đài phun nước vào khoảng trưa.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar bij de fontein rond het middaguur.
translations.hi: हम दोपहर के आसपास फव्वारे के पास मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się przy fontannie około południa.
translations.el: Συναντιόμαστε στο συντριβάνι γύρω στο μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Vi møtes ved fontenen rundt klokka tolv.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di air mancur sekitar tengah hari.
translations.sv: Vi ses vid fontänen runt tolvtiden.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la fântână pe la prânz.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se u kašny kolem poledne.
translations.da: Vi mødes ved springvandet ved middagstid.
translations.ja: 正午ごろ噴水で会います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun often meaning ‘we’ in colloquial French; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Reflexive clitic pronoun marking the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’ (here often reciprocal: ‘meet each other’); precedes the verb.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular (agrees with ‘on’); core predicate of the clause.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun ‘fontaine’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘à’, indicating the meeting place.
Preposition meaning ‘toward/around’; introduces a temporal complement.
Time noun; head of the complement to ‘vers’.

sentences.target: Tu remplis ta gourde à la fontaine.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃pli ta guʁd a la fɔ̃tɛn/

translations.fr: Tu remplis ta gourde à la fontaine.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃pli ta guʁd a la fɔ̃tɛn/
translations.en: You’re filling your bottle at the fountain.
translations.es: Estás llenando tu cantimplora en la fuente.
translations.de: Du füllst deine Trinkflasche am Brunnen.
translations.it: Stai riempiendo la tua borraccia alla fontana.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在喷泉旁给水壶加水。
translations.yue: 你喺噴泉度裝滿你嘅水樽。
translations.ru: Ты наполняешь свою флягу у фонтана.
translations.pt: Você está enchendo sua garrafa na fonte.
translations.he: אתה ממלא את בקבוק המים שלך ליד המזרקה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang đổ đầy bình nước của mình ở đài phun nước.
translations.ar: أنت تملأ قارورة الماء عند النافورة.
translations.nl: Je vult je waterfles bij de fontein.
translations.uk: Ти наповнюєш свою флягу біля фонтану.
translations.hu: A szökőkútnál töltöd meg a kulacsodat.
translations.hi: तुम फव्वारे पर अपनी पानी की बोतल भर रहे हो.
translations.el: Γεμίζεις το παγούρι σου στο συντριβάνι.
translations.nb: Du fyller drikkeflasken din ved fontenen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengisi botolmu di air mancur.
translations.sv: Du fyller din vattenflaska vid fontänen.
translations.da: Du fylder din drikkeflaske ved springvandet.
translations.ja: あなたは噴水で水筒に水を入れている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Transitive verb in the present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; feminine singular agreeing with ‘gourde’, modifies the noun.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘remplis’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘fontaine’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘à’, specifies the location.

sentences.target: La fontaine du parc est en marche aujourd’hui.
sentences.reading: /la fɔ̃tɛn dy paʁk ɛ ɑ̃ maʁʃ oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: La fontaine du parc est en marche aujourd’hui.
translations.ipa: /la fɔ̃tɛn dy paʁk ɛ ɑ̃ maʁʃ oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: The park fountain is on today.
translations.es: La fuente del parque está funcionando hoy.
translations.de: Der Springbrunnen im Park läuft heute.
translations.it: La fontana del parco è in funzione oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天公园的喷泉开启了。
translations.pt: A fonte do parque está funcionando hoje.
translations.vi: Đài phun nước trong công viên hôm nay đang hoạt động.
translations.nl: De fontein in het park staat vandaag aan.
translations.hi: आज पार्क का फव्वारा चालू है.
translations.el: Το συντριβάνι στο πάρκο λειτουργεί σήμερα.
translations.nb: Fontenen i parken er i gang i dag.
translations.id: Air mancur di taman hari ini beroperasi.
translations.sv: Fontänen i parken är igång i dag.
translations.da: Springvandet i parken kører i dag.
translations.ja: 公園の噴水は今日は稼働しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the complement ‘parc’ (‘of the park’).
Common noun; complement of ‘du’ modifying ‘fontaine’.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to a predicative complement.
Preposition; part of the fixed expression ‘en marche’ meaning ‘running/operational’.
Common noun inside the PP ‘en marche’; the whole PP functions as a predicative complement (‘is running/operational’).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; spelled with an apostrophe and treated as a single token.

sentences.target: Ils jouent près de la fontaine.

translations.fr: Ils jouent près de la fontaine.
translations.en: They are playing near the fountain.
translations.es: Están jugando cerca de la fuente.
translations.de: Sie spielen in der Nähe des Brunnens.
translations.pt: Eles estão brincando perto da fonte.
translations.vi: Họ đang chơi gần đài phun nước.
translations.nl: Ze spelen dicht bij de fontein.
translations.hi: वे फव्वारे के पास खेल रहे हैं.
translations.id: Mereka sedang bermain di dekat air mancur.
translations.ja: 彼らは噴水の近くで遊んでいます.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (typically masculine or mixed group); subject of the verb.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person plural; core predicate.
Adverb forming a complex preposition with ‘de’ (‘près de’ = ‘near’); modifies location.
Preposition completing the locution ‘près de’ by introducing the noun phrase complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘fontaine’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘de’ in the locative PP.
